calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Amec Foster Wheeler Environment And Infrastructure, Inc.S Notice Of Application And Application For Default Judgement Against Defendant Michael Scott Freedman; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Anthony Carucci, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Amec Foster Wheeler Environment and Infrastructure, Inc., a Nevada Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Michael Scott Freedman an individual dba Freedman Tung & Sasaki, a California Sole Proprietorship.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $79,865.79
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,314.38
Attorney's Fees: $9902.00
Costs: $2,758.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $101,840.77
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To Sep-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
